home.confirmInWallet: Confirm game start in your wallet...
home.playCostNote: $0.01 USDC, USDT, or USDm on Celo per paid game. Keep a little CELO for network fees (gas).
home.top100Prize: Top 100 players share additional prize pool rewards
home.telegramCta: Join community, get latest developments & learn about prizes

landing.tagline: Predict crypto prices and earn rewards
landing.walletCostNotice: Each paid game is $0.01 in USDC, USDT, or USDm on the Celo network. Keep a small CELO balance for network fees (gas). Some wallets use CELO for fees if stablecoin gas isn’t available.
landing.walletExtensionNote: Missing Phantom or “Other browser wallet”? Install Phantom (enable Ethereum) or another wallet for this site, then refresh the page.
landing.connectSubtitle: Pick your wallet — browser extensions first, then Valora QR if enabled.
landing.connectValoraQrSub: WalletConnect — scan with the Valora app or another mobile wallet
landing.connectUserRejected: You cancelled the wallet prompt. Try again when ready.
landing.walletHint: Enable Ethereum in Phantom if you use it. Valora QR needs NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID (free from cloud.reown.com).
landing.connectError: Failed to connect. Please try again.
landing.termsAgree: By connecting, you agree to our Terms of Service

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentDesc: The monthly tournament starts on April 1st and runs until May 1st
leaderboard.monthlyTournamentSub: Top players earn real cash rewards every month
leaderboard.top100Extra: 🎁 Top 100 players share additional prize pool rewards

profile.supportSubtitle: Report issues or get help via Telegram
profile.noTradesHint: Start playing to build your history!

airdrop.title: Rewards
airdrop.holdIntro: Hold your TPOINTs to unlock payouts and reach exclusive services!
airdrop.periodicalPrizesDesc: Stay in the top players on the Leaderboard and receive prizes directly into your MiniPay wallet periodically.
airdrop.maximizeScoreDesc: Make score as much as possible for each game. Challenge yourself and push your limits every round!
airdrop.leaveProfitDesc: You can leave with profit — even more than 🪙10,000+. The sky is the limit for skilled traders.
airdrop.leaderboardBanner: 🏆 Top Leaderboard players receive periodical prizes sent directly to their MiniPay wallets. Keep playing and keep earning!
airdrop.airdropBlurb: Stay tuned for exciting rewards! Our airdrop program will reward loyal Tradcast players with exclusive tokens.

tradearea.gameBusyDesc: The game server is experiencing high traffic. Please try again later.
tradearea.fundsReturned: 💰 Your funds and transaction fee will be returned.
tradearea.activePositionDesc: You must close your position before exiting the game.
tradearea.liquidatedDesc: Your balance reached 🪙0. Better luck next time!
tradearea.statusTxRejected: Transaction rejected - you can still exit

about.mainP1: Tradcast is a real-life volatile trading simulation game. All price data is 100% real market data aggregated across multiple tokens and timeframes.
about.mainP2: Practice your trading skills with real volatility, zero financial risk. Master the art of reading charts, timing entries, and managing positions.
about.longExpl: LONG: Opens a long position or adds 🪙100 to an existing long position. Profit when price goes UP.
about.shortExpl: SHORT: Opens a short position or adds 🪙100 to an existing short position. Profit when price goes DOWN.
about.closeExpl: CLOSE: Closes your current position and realizes your profit or loss.
about.rule1: You cannot open LONG and SHORT positions at the same time
about.rule2: There is no hedge in this game
about.rule3: To switch direction, close your position first
about.flow1: Start the game and watch the real-time chart
about.flow2: Open positions using LONG or SHORT buttons
about.flow3: Close your position when ready to take profit or cut loss
about.flow4: Click "Claim & Exit" to claim your TPOINT tokens
about.flow5: Return to home page with your earned rewards!
about.feat1Desc: Trade with authentic price movements from real crypto markets.
about.feat2Desc: All positions use 20× leverage for amplified gains (and losses!).
about.feat3Desc: Profit from your trades and earn TPOINT tokens as rewards.
about.feat4Desc: Climb the leaderboard and prove your trading skills.
about.celoNotice: You need 0.01$ to play this game
about.footerNote: Start practicing now and build your trading skills for when it matters most!
about.supportHint: Having issues? Send us a ticket via Telegram
